mission.em1.title: Guardian of the Forest
mission.em1.story: Complete 14 morning routines to earn the magical Guardian Armour.
mission.em2.title: Sunbeam Expedition
mission.em2.story: Drink water 30 times to focus your energy and unfold the Sun Wings.
mission.em3.title: The Night Watch
mission.em3.story: Complete 7 evening routines to illuminate the darkness.
mission.em4.title: Bookworm Saga
mission.em4.story: Read for 10 days to find the hidden Book of Wisdom.
mission.em5.title: Football Legend
mission.em5.story: Go to training 6 times to become the Football Legend of the realm!
mission.em6.title: Star Hunter
mission.em6.story: Complete ALL tasks for 5 days to catch a lost star.

Welcome to
Thang Long!

onboarding.egg.moss.desc: Still as the forest. Gentle and wise.

parentOnboarding.welcome.title: Hello! You're setting Ronki up for your child.
parentOnboarding.welcome.body: Quick setup, then the phone belongs to your child again.

parentOnboarding.pin.body: Choose your parent PIN. It protects screen time, rewards, and routine changes.
parentOnboarding.pin.mismatch: The two PINs don't match. Try again.

parentOnboarding.family.body: Ronki greets your child by name and remembers siblings.

parentOnboarding.analytics.body: Helps us make Ronki better. You can change this anytime in the parent area.
parentOnboarding.done.title: Done!
parentOnboarding.done.body: Hand the phone back to {childName} — Ronki is waiting.
parentOnboarding.done.bodyNoName: Hand the phone back to your child — Ronki is waiting.
kidIntro.greeting: Hello! Before we meet, please fetch Mom or Dad.
handoff.kidToParent.titleAccent: then the phone is your child's.
handoff.kidToParent.body: Name, age, one daily routine — that's it. Ronki takes care of the rest.
handoff.kidToParent.parentShortcut: I'll hand it to my child in a moment

onboarding.teach.soloLine: He learned it. He'll never forget.
onboarding.teach.smokeFail: Oh, that was too short. Just smoke! Try once more.
onboarding.teach.tryAgain: One more try. Breathe deep and hold a long time.

gear.g_helm.desc: Forged from the heart of an old tree. Protects against lazy excuses.
gear.g_wings.desc: Glow brighter the more you move. Give you courage to fly.
gear.g_lantern.desc: Captures starlight. Shows you the way when it's dark.
gear.g_crown.desc: Born from stories read. Every book makes it stronger.
gear.g_cape.desc: Woven from sunbeams and training sweat. Makes you fast and strong.
gear.g_amulet.desc: A shard from the brightest star. Grants ultimate power and protection.
gearslot.head: Head
arc.first.title: The First Adventure
arc.first.beats.dream.before: I had a strange dream last night. Want to hear it?
arc.first.beats.dream.text: I dreamed of a place I had never seen before. It was close by. Maybe you know it — maybe you have a map of it in your head. We should draw it.
arc.first.beats.dream.after: Wow. Your head is full of places. Let's draw one of them.
arc.first.beats.map.title: Draw a map
arc.first.beats.map.before: Pick a favorite place — your room, the garden, the playground. And draw it.
arc.first.beats.map.step1: Color the map with shades that fit the place.
arc.first.beats.map.step2: Hang it somewhere you can see it.
arc.first.beats.map.step3: Tell someone in the family about it.
arc.first.beats.map.step4: Show it to me when you are done!
arc.first.beats.map.after: A map! Now we both know where we can go.
arc.first.beats.wake.before: One more thing and I will be fully awake for our adventure — do a morning routine with me.
arc.listening.title: The Whisper Game
arc.listening.beats.whisper.before: Shh! Did you hear that? Something is whispering in the meadow!
arc.listening.beats.whisper.text: Last night, when everything was quiet, I heard a tiny whisper in the grass. It sounded like a small voice that wanted to tell a story. But I could only hear it when everything was really quiet.
arc.listening.beats.whisper.after: You know what? When you're really still, you hear the best stories.
arc.listening.beats.jar.title: Build a Listening Jar
arc.listening.beats.jar.before: Let's build a listening jar! We'll collect all the sounds we heard today.
arc.listening.beats.jar.step1: Find an empty jar or can.
arc.listening.beats.jar.step2: Draw or glue three things you heard today on it.
arc.listening.beats.jar.step3: Put it next to your bed.
arc.listening.beats.jar.step4: Tell me tomorrow what you heard!
arc.listening.beats.jar.after: A listening jar! Now we can collect the silence.
arc.listening.beats.read.before: Now it gets cozy. Read something — then we'll listen for the whisper together.
arc.listening.beats.read.after: Did you hear it? The whisper said: You are brave. And I think it's right.
arc.garden.title: Ronki's Garden
arc.garden.beats.seed.before: Look what I found! A tiny little seed!
arc.garden.beats.seed.text: This morning I found a tiny seed in the meadow. It was so small you could barely see it. But I think something big is hiding inside. Just like you — every day you grow a little bit.
arc.garden.beats.seed.after: Does the seed grow a little bit every day too? Let's find out!
arc.garden.beats.plant.title: Plant something
arc.garden.beats.plant.before: Your turn! Plant a seed or draw a plant.
arc.garden.beats.plant.step1: Find a seed (cress, sunflower, or anything you can find).
arc.garden.beats.plant.step2: Plant it in a small pot with soil.
arc.garden.beats.plant.step4: Put it by the window where the sun shines!
arc.garden.beats.plant.after: Now we both have a garden! Yours grows by the window, mine in the meadow.
arc.garden.beats.tidy.before: Did you know? A tidy room is like a neat garden. Everything has its place.
arc.garden.beats.tidy.after: Perfect! Your room looks like a beautiful garden. Ronki is proud!
arc.garden.complete: Ronki's garden is blooming — and so is yours!
arc.weather.title: The Weather Walker
arc.weather.beats.rain.before: Oh no! Something funny happened to me today...
arc.weather.beats.rain.text: I went outside today without looking up. And then — splash! — rain! Wet everywhere! You know what I learned? The sky always tells you what's coming. You just have to look.
arc.weather.beats.rain.after: From now on, we'll both look up in the morning — promise!
arc.weather.beats.draw.title: Draw two outfits
arc.weather.beats.draw.before: Draw what you'd wear on a sunny day — and a rainy day!
arc.weather.beats.draw.step1: Draw a sunshine outfit on one side.
arc.weather.beats.draw.step2: Draw a rain outfit on the other side.
arc.weather.beats.draw.step3: Hang the picture on your closet.
arc.weather.beats.draw.step4: Look outside tomorrow morning and decide which side fits!
arc.weather.beats.draw.after: Genius! Now you always know what to wear.
arc.weather.beats.dress.before: Look out the window — what do you see? Then get dressed to match!
arc.weather.beats.dress.after: Perfectly dressed! The sky would be proud of you. And so am I.
arc.pilzhueter.title: The Mushroom Keeper
arc.pilzhueter.beats.reunion.before: I have to tell you something... When I was really little, I got lost in the forest. Between the big roots.
arc.pilzhueter.beats.reunion.after: The Mushroom Keeper found me. He showed me the way. We became friends. But then the forest grew... and we lost each other. Until today.
arc.pilzhueter.beats.pose.title: The Tree Pose
arc.pilzhueter.beats.pose.step1: Stand tall like a tree. Both feet firmly on the ground.
arc.pilzhueter.beats.pose.step2: Lift one foot and rest it against your other leg.
arc.pilzhueter.beats.pose.step3: Stretch your arms up — those are your branches.
arc.pilzhueter.beats.pose.step4: Breathe deep. Hold. You are a tree.
arc.pilzhueter.beats.pose.before: The Mushroom Keeper wants to show you something. He says: when everything feels too big, you can become a tree. Try it with me!
arc.pilzhueter.beats.pose.after: My first try... I fell over. But it felt good. Thank you, Mushroom Keeper.
arc.pilzhueter.beats.realife.before: The Mushroom Keeper has a wish. Try the tree pose tomorrow morning, before brushing your teeth. Just once. Just for you.
arc.pilzhueter.beats.realife.after: You did it! I could feel it.
arc.pilzhueter.beats.callback.before: Hey... the Mushroom Keeper was just here. He asked how you're doing.
arc.pilzhueter.beats.callback.after: He says: you don't have to be a tree every day. But when the world feels too big... you know what you can do.

analytics.disclosure.title: Anonymous usage statistics
analytics.disclosure.body: Ronki sends a few anonymous events (e.g. 'quest done') so we can improve the app. No names, no text, no location. You can turn this off in the Parent Area anytime.
